summary: While the procedural, protocol-driven nature of this role perfectly aligns with your cognitive strengths, the extreme emotional labor and chronic exposure to gruesome trauma present a significant threat to your personal wellbeing. Despite the early morning start times, the frequent on-call duties and unpredictable caseloads directly conflict with your priority for predictable and sustainable hours. Ultimately, the high burnout risk and intense legal liability make this career path unsuitable for a candidate who values long-term career sustainability and mental health.
